text: This is Sift — a crossfilter data explorer. We're looking at a hundred and fourteen thousand Spotify tracks, loaded from HuggingFace as Parquet and decoded with WebAssembly.

overlay.title: Sift
overlay.body: Crossfilter exploration for large datasets — Apache Arrow + WASM

text: Every column gets a live summary automatically. Histograms for numbers, frequency bars for categories, and ratio indicators for booleans. All computed in Rust, running as WASM.

overlay.text: Live summaries — histograms, category bars, boolean ratios

text: Over a hundred thousand tracks. Zero jank. Watch the stats bar — the dom only holds visible rows at any time. Everything else renders on demand.

Here's the real trick. Drag the track name column wider and every row height recalculates instantly. No dom measurement. Pretext computes text layout with pure arithmetic — faster than a single dom reflow.

overlay.title: 0.0002ms per cell
overlay.body: Pure arithmetic text measurement — faster than one DOM reflow

text: Sort by danceability with a single click. Nulls always go last, exactly where you'd expect them.

overlay.text: Click to sort — nulls always last

text: Drag across the danceability histogram to filter by range. Watch every other column's summary update in real time — that's crossfiltering.

overlay.text: Brush to filter — crossfilter updates everything

text: Click Yes on the explicit column and the table filters instantly. Row count drops, every summary updates.

overlay.text: Boolean filter — click Yes or No to drill down

text: Clear all filters and the full dataset snaps back instantly. A hundred and fourteen thousand tracks, ready to explore again.

overlay.text: All 114,000 tracks — back in an instant

text: Light and dark themes, built in.
Sift. Open source on GitHub. Star the repo and explore your own data.

overlay.title: github.com/rgbkrk/sift
overlay.body: Apache Arrow • Rust WASM • Pretext Layout • Semiotic Charts
